title: ENERGY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO ENERGY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric, gas, and heating fuel payment assistance. May be able to assist with utilities that have been disconnected or shut off for non-payment. Unable to assist with an account that has been closed. Assistance is not guaranteed. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Pacific Power customers Hours: Not accepting appointments Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Energy Assistance Information Line (503) 669-8350 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Send an email with the following information: -Full name of the account holder -Phone number -Attach a copy of current Pacific Power bill FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Current utility bill LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Electric Service Payment Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Gas Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD JUSTICE HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME FINDER SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH AND FAMILY EDUCATION ENGAGEMENT PREK-12 INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - UNICA If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO
